title: Industrial Engineers
description: Design, develop, test, and evaluate integrated systems for managing industrial production processes, including human work factors, quality control, inventory control, logistics and material flow, cost analysis, and production coordination.

tasks.text: Estimate production costs, cost saving methods, and the effects of product design changes on expenditures for management review, action, and control.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and establish sequence of operations to fabricate and assemble parts or products and to promote efficient utilization.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze statistical data and product specifications to determine standards and establish quality and reliability objectives of finished product.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with clients, vendors, staff, and management personnel regarding purchases, product and production specifications, manufacturing capabilities, or project status.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Communicate with management and user personnel to develop production and design standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate precision and accuracy of production and testing equipment and engineering drawings to formulate corrective action plan.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend methods for improving utilization of personnel, material, and utilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Record or oversee recording of information to ensure currency of engineering drawings and documentation of production problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draft and design layout of equipment, materials, and workspace to illustrate maximum efficiency using drafting tools and computer.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct workers engaged in product measurement, inspection, and testing activities to ensure quality control and reliability.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop manufacturing methods, labor utilization standards, and cost analysis systems to promote efficient staff and facility utilization.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review production schedules, engineering specifications, orders, and related information to obtain knowledge of manufacturing methods, procedures, and activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Complete production reports, purchase orders, and material, tool, and equipment lists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate and implement quality control objectives, activities, or procedures to resolve production problems, maximize product reliability, or minimize costs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement methods and procedures for disposition of discrepant material and defective or damaged parts, and assess cost and responsibility.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Apply statistical methods and perform mathematical calculations to determine manufacturing processes, staff requirements, and production standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study operations sequence, material flow, functional statements, organization charts, and project information to determine worker functions and responsibilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Formulate sampling procedures and designs and develop forms and instructions for recording, evaluating, and reporting quality and reliability data.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Regulate and alter workflow schedules according to established manufacturing sequences and lead times to expedite production operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule deliveries based on production forecasts, material substitutions, storage and handling facilities, and maintenance requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
